/usr/bin/cc -flto -Wl,--gc-sections CMakeFiles/svgtiny_test_svg2mvg.dir/test/svg2mvg.c.o -o svgtiny_test_svg2mvg  -Wl,-rpath,/app/build/contrib/libsvgtiny:/app/build/contrib/libdom:/app/build/contrib/libnsutils:/app/build/contrib/libhubbub:/app/build/contrib/libparserutils libsvgtiny.so.1 ../libdom/libdom.so.1 ../libnsutils/libnsutils.so.1 ../libhubbub/libhubbub.so.1 ../libparserutils/libparserutils.so.1 -lxml2 -lm
